replies.msg:
Dear 123,

With reference to the examination results that you have submitted recently, you have fulfilled the condition(s) of admission as set out in the offer of admission dated December 8, 2018. In this connection, we are pleased to confirm your admission to the Bachelor of ____ in ___ programme in 2018.

You are required to submit official proof or officially certified copy of your results and/or qualifications to the University’s satisfaction according to the instructions given here. Registration procedures are normally made available here from mid-July onwards; you will also be notified of the arrangements in due course.

We hope and trust that your time in HKU will be rewarding and fulfilling, and that you, like generations of HKU students before you do, will go on to "make a difference" to the world around us.

May we once again on behalf of the HKU family express our warm welcome to you!

Best regards,

Admissions Office
Registry
The University of Hong Kong
